allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://pub-166082e4b3d54bb296c0e624eb1a1f50.r2.dev/products/romazzina_2.jpg" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://pub-166082e4b3d54bb296c0e624eb1a1f50.r2.dev/products/300384.jpg" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "200 OK" } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5181/api/products/9c9f3a9d-aee5-4b1c-9171-a3723c5e2c55" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content } catch { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/products/9c9f3a9d-aee5-4b1c-9171-a3723c5e2c55" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5181/api/products?search=300384&page=1&pageSize=5" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })
